title: Clean up pylint warnings and errors for podman
body:
* Some of the pedantic errors were not corrected
* Clean up prep for porting to MacOS and PyPi hosting
* Fix broken unittest

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan When I wrote most of the code I was ignorant that id() was python function.  So I've been scrubbing my use of id where it conflicts with python, but trying to not confuse the varlink API which uses 'id' as a key into the results.
overall LGTM. I don't understand why the underscores are where they are for some variables, but I trust that it's pylint being a poor program.
@jwhonce Tests should be fixed on master, can you rebase?
One more comment to be addressed and then I think we can merge
@mheon I think we're good to go.

:pushpin: Commit 404d803 has been approved by `rhatdan`
